creator: wblock@wonkity.com
text:
hugin 0.7.b4_2 fails to build after the change to gettext-0.17_1.

How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/graphics/hugin
# grep -e VERSION -e REVISION /usr/ports/graphics/hugin/Makefile
DISTVERSION=	0.7_beta4
PORTREVISION=	2
# make
===>   hugin-0.7.b4_2 depends on executable: zip - found
===>   hugin-0.7.b4_2 depends on executable: gmake - found
===>   hugin-0.7.b4_2 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/automake-1.10 - found
===>   hugin-0.7.b4_2 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/autoconf-2.61 - found
===>   hugin-0.7.b4_2 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/libtool - found
===>   hugin-0.7.b4_2 depends on shared library: pano13 - found
===>   hugin-0.7.b4_2 depends on shared library: tiff - found
===>   hugin-0.7.b4_2 depends on shared library: png - found
===>   hugin-0.7.b4_2 depends on shared library: jpeg - found
===>   hugin-0.7.b4_2 depends on shared library: boost_date_time - found
===>   hugin-0.7.b4_2 depends on shared library: iconv.3 - found
===>   hugin-0.7.b4_2 depends on shared library: intl - found
===>   hugin-0.7.b4_2 depends on shared library: wx_base-2.6 - found
===>  Configuring for hugin-0.7.b4_2
cd /usr/ports/graphics/hugin/work/hugin-0.7_beta4 && /usr/bin/env ACLOCAL=/usr/local/bin/aclocal-1.10 AUTOMAKE=/usr/local/bin/automake-1.10 AUTOMAKE_VERSION=110 AUTOCONF=/usr/local/bin/autoconf-2.61 AUTOHEADER=/usr/local/bin/autoheader-2.61 AUTOIFNAMES=/usr/local/bin/ifnames-2.61 AUTOM4TE=/usr/local/bin/autom4te-2.61 AUTORECONF=/usr/local/bin/autoreconf-2.61 AUTOSCAN=/usr/local/bin/autoscan-2.61 AUTOUPDATE=/usr/local/bin/autoupdate-2.61 AUTOCONF_VERSION=261 LIBTOOL=/usr/local/bin/libtool LIBTOOLIZE=/usr/local/bin/libtoolize LIBTOOL_M4=/usr/local/share/aclocal/libtool.m4 ./bootstrap

You must have gettextize 0.11.0 or later installed to compile hugin.
Install the appropriate package for your distribution,
or get the source tarball at http://ftp.gnu.org/gnu/gettext/
autoconf version: 2.61 2006 . . . .
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/hugin.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/hugin.
